scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace packages/shared && npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web && npm run lint --workspace apps/agents
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace packages/shared && npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/web && npm run test --workspace apps/agents
